# mtncloud_monitoring_check (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud monitoring check by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_monitoring_check" "home" {
  name = "home-page"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the check to look up.

### Read-Only

- `check_interval` (Number) Milliseconds between check executions.
- `check_type` (String) Check-type code.
- `description` (String) Description of the check.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the check.
- `severity` (String) Severity threshold for notifications.
